expected_path_note: SC1=N -> SC2=Y -> SC3=N (8%) -> DE1-3 -> DE4=N (dividends are a small part of income/wealth) -> exit
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 17 – Passive Eight Percent Shareholder Ethiopia Dam Contractor
activities: Paolo Ricci holds an 8% stake, per the register, in a contractor that builds irrigation dams for Ethiopia's federal water ministry. He acquired the stake as a financial investment through a private-equity vehicle; he has no board seat, no management role and no operational involvement. The dividends from this stake amounted to about 6% of his income last year, and the stake represents roughly a tenth of his wealth, the rest being his Milan engineering-consultancy business and securities.
origin_of_assets: Engineering consultancy earnings and financial investments.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Consultancy business, securities portfolio, minority stake.
